nameMeanings.name: Talley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Tolley  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one or more of the places in northern France named Tailly (Somme, Ardennes). It is uncertain that this surname survived into modern times.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Taithligh ‘descendant of Taithleach’, a byname or personal name meaning ‘peaceable’. This surname is now very rare in Ireland.

variants.name: Tally
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Talley  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tallie
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Talley  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland. In the US, it is found mainly among African Americans.

variants.name: Talty
meanings: Irish (Clare): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tailtigh ‘descendant of Tailteach’, a personal name which Woulfe believes to be a variant of Taithleach, a byname or personal name meaning ‘peaceable’ (see Talley ).

variants.name: Tolley
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Toli (Old Norse Tóli, a particularly East Scandinavian pet form of names in Thórr ‘the god Thor’ + an element beginning with l-).
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Russian Telyatev: nickname or metonymic occupational name derived from telyata ‘calves’.

nameMeanings.name: Rev.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin vocabulary word meaning ‘king’. This was not used as a personal name in Latin of the classical or Christian periods, and its adoption as a given name seems to have been a 19th-century innovation. Its popularity was increased by the fame of the British actor  Rex Harrison  (  1908–90 ), who was christened  Reginald Carey .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: Rev. John Talley was born in 1600, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son with Margaret Tilley. He died in 1660, in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 60.

ja.lifeSummary: Rev. John Talleyは1600年にイギリスイギリスエセックスで生まれた。彼はMargaret Tilleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1660年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーボストンで60歳で死去した。

ko.Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Rev. John Talley(은)는 1600년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났다. 그는 Margaret Tilley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1660년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.
